scope_goal: Harden context basket and vault persistence recovery so malformed optional metadata is salvaged and rewritten without discarding valid local state, and cover that recovery contract with focused tests.
tasks_completed: Updated context basket recovery to treat malformed optional metadata as salvageable while still rejecting unrecoverable schema or item-id payloads.
Updated vault state recovery to preserve valid lock/project state when optional metadata fields are malformed, then rewrite normalized persisted state.
Normalized context basket item-id handling so mixed invalid entries can be salvaged and rewritten instead of forcing a full discard.
Added focused metadata-only corruption tests for both context basket and vault persistence paths, including backup-promotion recovery cases.
roadmap_items: Milestone 1 - Bootstrap Flow Stabilization: context basket and vault persistence hardening.
kickoff_budget_note: Thread Kickoff Template budget applied: task budget `8`, time budget `45m`, size limits `<=12 files` and `<=500 net LOC`, max fix attempts per failing gate `2`. Tasks completed: `4 of 8`. Budget status: within limits at `5` files changed with `304` insertions and `33` deletions versus `codex/integrator`; this lane stayed within the time window and did not exceed the `2`-attempt gate-fix limit.
approved_exception_note: Ownership note: runtime edits stay within the lane-owned paths `src/qual/context/**` and `src/qual/storage/**`. The only non-owned change is the approved test file `tests/unit/test_context_storage_recovery.py`; there are no shared-by-approval source-file edits and no integrator-locked edits.
